other.name: Tactical Acumen

other.name: Path of Command
other.description: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that stratagem by 1CP.

other.name: Aspect Training
other.description:
While this model is leading a Howling Banshees unit, it has the Fights First ability.

other.name: Cloudstrider
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your opponent's turn, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In addition, while this model is leading a unit, when that unit is set-up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, in your Movement phase, it can use this ability. if it does, that unit can be set-up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

other.name: Titanic Strides
other.description:
Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding Titanic models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:
It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, this model is battle-shocked.

other.description: At the start of the battle, select one of the following keywords: Infantry, Monster, Mounted, Vehicle. Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit with the selected keyword, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

other.name: Psychic Guidance
other.description: While this model is within 12" of one or more friendly Aeldari Psyker models, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by this model by 1 and it has a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Ghostglaive - Strike; ➤ Ghostglaive - Sweep; Wraithbone Fists; Shuriken Catapult; Flamer; ➤ Aeldari Missile Launcher - Starshot; ➤ Aeldari Missile Launcher - Sunburst; Bright Lance; Scatter Laser; Shuriken Cannon; Starcannon.

other.name: Herald of Ynnead
other.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Aeldari model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

other.name: Word of the Phoenix (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models (excluding Support Weapon models) are returned to that unit with their full wounds remaining.

other.name: Servant of the Whispering God
other.description: If your army includes Yvraine, it cannot include any Epic Hero units (excluding Ynnari units). If your army includes any Epic Hero units (excluding Ynnari units), it cannot include Yvraine.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Kha-vir; Storm of Whispers.

other.name: Mandiblasters
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

selections.label: Shuriken Pistol, Scorpion Chainsword & Scorpion's claw

composition.equipment: equipped with: Scorpion chainsword; Shuriken pistol.

other.name: Titanic Advance
other.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding ^^Titanic^^ models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

other.name: Towering Wraith Construct
other.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

other.name: Flawless Poise
other.description: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

damaged.description: While this model has 1-16 wounds remaining, subtract 10 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Phantom feet; Voidstorm missile launcher; D-bombard; Phantom pulsar; Phantom starcannon; ➤ Wraith glaive - strike; ➤ Wraith glaive - sweep; Pulse laser.

other.name: Titanic Advance
other.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding ^^Titanic^^ models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

other.name: Towering Wraith Construct
other.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend twice that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

other.name: Revenant Jet Pack
other.description: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 8" to the Move characteristic of this model.

damaged.description: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 8 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Cloudburst missile launcher; Revenant feet; Sonic Lance; Revenant Pulsar.

other.name: Overlord
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While that unit is below its Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

other.name: Reborn Mastermind
other.description: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratgem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Huskblade; Splinter Pistol; Blast Pistol.

other.name: Tormentors
other.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Klaive.

other.name: Phantasm Grenade Launcher
other.description: The bearer’s unit has the Grenades keyword.

other.name: Sadistic Raiders
other.description: At the end of your Command phase, if you control an objective marker that this unit (or a Transport it is embarked within) is within range of, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control  over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of any phase.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Shredder; Close Combat Weapon; Splinter Rifle; Close Combat Weapon; Blaster; Close Combat Weapon; Splinter Cannon; Close Combat Weapon; Dark Lance; Close Combat Weapon.

other.name: Aethersails
other.description: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Bladevanes; Disintegrator Cannon; Dark Lance.

other.name: Eviscerating Fly-by
other.description: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Splinter Rifle; Splinter Pistol; Bladevanes; Blaster; Splinter Pistol; Bladevanes; Splinter Pistol; Heat Lance; Bladevanes; Splinter Pistol; Agonizer; Bladevanes.

other.name: Empowered by Death
other.description: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model's unit is below its Starting Strength, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

other.name: Storm of Blades
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Succubus Weapons; Splinter Pistol; Blast Pistol.

other.name: Lithe Embarkation
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Ynnari Infantry unit that only includes models from the units listed in this unit's Transport section, that has 6 or fewer models and that is wholly within 6" of this Transport. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Bladevanes; Splinter Cannon; Twin Splinter Rifle.

other.name: No Escape
other.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Splinter Pistol; Hekatarii Blade; Hekatarii Blade.

other.name: Monofilament Snare
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Shadow Weaver. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit it snared. While a unit is snared, each time that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Shadow weaver; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Catapult.

other.name: Sonic Destruction
other.description: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack with its Vibro Cannon that targets an enemy unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1 for each other friendly Vibro Cannon Platform model that made one or more attacks with its Vibro Cannon that also targeted that enemy unit this phase.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Vibro Cannon; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Catapult.

other.name: Empyric Ambush
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it used its Flickerjump ability.

other.name: Whispering Web
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Aeldari model makes an attack that targets that unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Brood Twain; Spider's Fangs; Weaverender.

other.name: Scattershield
other.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save and each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

other.name: Titanic Agility
other.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

damaged.description: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Titanic Ghostglaive - Strike; ➤ Titanic Ghostglaive - Sweep; Heavy Wraithcannon; Scatter Laser; Shuriken Cannon; Starcannon.

other.name: Piratical Hero
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, that attack has the ^^**[Sustained Hits 1]**^^ ability and add 1 to the Hit roll.

other.name: Prince of Corsairs
other.description: After both players have deployed their armies, if this model is on the battlefield (or any ^^**Transport**^^ it is embarked within is on the battlefield), select up to three ^^**Aeldari**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

composition.equipment: equipped with: The Eye of Wrath; The Spear of Twilight; Shuriken Pistol.

other.name: Aethersense (Psychic)
other.description: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

other.name: Fury of the Void (Psychic)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more attacks made with this model’s Dread of the Deep Void. Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an ^^**Aeldari**^^ model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Dread of the Deep Void; Waystave.

other.name: Hallucinogen Grenades
other.description: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one ^^**Aeldari**^^ Infantry unit from your army visible to and within 36" of this unit: until the end of the phase, that unit has the Stealth ability.

other.name: Raid and Run
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3". Otherwise, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can make a Fall Back move of up to D3+3".

composition.equipment: equipped with: Corsair Blade; Corsair Blade; Shuriken Pistol; Corsair blaster; Close Combat Weapon; Flamer; Close Combat Weapon; Fusion gun; Close Combat Weapon; Shredder; Close Combat Weapon.

other.description: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

other.name: Winds of War
other.description: This model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

other.name: Awakened Spirit
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
